items.title: Meet the First ETF to Surpass $2 Trillion in Net Assets. Here's Why It's a Great Buy in October
items.description: For as little as $1, this low-cost ETF gives investors exposure to thousands of companies.

items.title: SPUS: 10 Stocks To Complement This Shariah-Compliant S&P 500 ETF
items.description: SPUS offers Shariah-compliant exposure to U.S. equities but is tech-heavy and riskier than standard index ETFs. Check out why SPUS ETF is a hold.

items.title: A Major Stock Market Storm Is About To Be Unleashed
items.description: The stock market shows strain as the S&P 500 dispersion hits highs seen in major drawdowns, signaling volatility risks ahead. Learn why this could trigger a snapback.

items.title: Flying In The Dark
items.description: U.S. stocks hit record highs amid rate cut hopes and a federal shutdown.

items.title: Why I Think The S&P 500 Has Become Irrelevant, And What I'm Doing About It
items.description: The S&P 500 has lost much of its distinctiveness, increasingly mirroring the Nasdaq 100 due to mega-cap tech dominance. Check out how long the trend will persist.
